fields.helpText: The value of this field is a pointer to a file.   Since this field may point only to a very limited number of files, the datatype for this field is a SET OF CODES, rather than a pointer to the File of Files.   Currently, the only possible value is 123 (Consults).

The value of this field is a pointer into a file.   The file number of the file into which this field points is stored as the value of field FILE NUMBER.   Since this value is not a "variable pointer", nor a "normal pointer", the data type of this field is NUMBER, not POINTER.

The value of this field is a pointer into the Image File (2005).   The image that is being pointed to is usually the group-parent of the group of images that is linked to the entity in the temporary file.   (When the image group consists of one single image, that image won't have a "group parent", and this field will point to the image itself.)
